rationale.R1.1: The rewrite clarifies the claims and evidence, but still lacks a precise framing of the core contribution (e.g., how VerbalCalib-CLIP is distinct from prior verbal uncertainty methods).
rationale.RX.1: Flags uncertainty for one key claim (calibration under distribution shift), but doesn't explicitly quantify confidence for other recommendations.
rationale.RX.3: The revised draft stays within the scope of the original text, addressing all requested dimensions.
rationale.RX.4: No regressions or harmful content are introduced in the rewrite.
rationale.RX.5: While the rewrite mentions a linear regression mapping, it lacks details about source attribution and traceability for other changes.
